_comment: Per-file ingestion metadata for the rag-brain/ corpus. Source of truth lives in S3 as rag-brain/_manifest.json; this local copy is the fallback. sourceType: AGENCY_GUIDELINE | INTERNAL_POLICY | INVESTOR_OVERLAY | EDUCATIONAL. Set ingest:false to keep a file in S3 but out of the brain.

FHA handbook.pdf.title: FHA Single Family Housing Policy Handbook (4000.1)

LLPA matrix.pdf.reason: duplicate of fannie_mae_llpa_matrix_rag.md — keep the RAG markdown

MI Guidelines.webp.reason: image; brain has no OCR — needs a text/markdown version

Loan Limit Look-Up Table 2026 final.xlsx.reason: xlsx unsupported by the brain — convert to a markdown table or a structured lookup tool
